commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer/security judgment on what ban-reason text may be public; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete sensitive-data disclosure risk by copying free-form manual ban reasons into external email notifications.; Review finding: [P1] Do not email raw manual ban reasons — convex/users.ts:283 (sha=7f96958a8ff2c616889edb03dcf2f453b4edeb8c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Resend-backed ban and account-restored email notifications for manual bans, malware autobans, unbans, and autoban remediation, plus docs, env examples, and unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect by source inspection: a manual ban with any unrecognized reason reaches the email formatter and is returned verbatim into the outgoing Resend payload. I did not execute it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real-behavior proof plus maintainer/security judgment on what ban-reason text may be public; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof.

target.title: Email users when accounts are banned
target.body:
## Summary
- send best-effort Resend ban notification emails for manual bans and malware autobans
- send best-effort account-restored emails for manual unbans and autoban remediation
- include public-safe scanner context, related skill/plugin naming when resolvable, and reply-to guidance
- document Resend env setup and moderation email behavior

## Review / testing
- `codex review --uncommitted` (from `origin/main` autoreview skill): final pass reported no discrete correctness issues before the latest-main merge
- `bun run test convex/users.test.ts convex/autobanRemediation.test.ts --run`
- `bun run format:check -- convex/users.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/autobanRemediation.test.ts docs/moderation.md specs/security-moderation.md`
- `bun run lint convex/users.ts convex/users.test.ts convex/autobanRemediation.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
